directions.observed: Eyes, nose, and muzzle point unmistakably down beneath the brow.
Strong downward gaze with a subtle but visible screen-left facial shift.
Lowered muzzle and visible eye advance into the screen-left quadrant.
Near-left profile retains a downward pitch.
Nose and visible pupil form an unmistakable screen-left profile.
Left-facing profile begins lifting the muzzle and gaze.
Lifted screen-left face continues smoothly toward the front.
Near-front pose retains a subtle leftward facial bias and lifted gaze one step before 000.
